_comment: Three monthly headline sentiment prints used as OBR growth-input proxies. (a) S&P Global UK Services PMI (licensed series; we mirror only the published press-release headline). (b) GfK/NIESR Consumer Confidence Barometer (headline index; sub-indices are subscription-gated). (c) RICS UK Residential Market Survey house-price balance (headline net percentage; full back-set is RICS-subscription). All three are lawful fair-use summaries of publicly released headline values. Refreshed monthly when each release drops.

services_pmi.source: S&P Global / CIPS UK Services PMI, March 2026 final (released 2026-04-07; flash 51.2 released 2026-03-24)

consumer_confidence.source: NIQ (GfK) Consumer Confidence Barometer, March 2026 release dated 2026-03-27 (https://nielseniq.com/global/en/news-center/2026/consumer-confidence-down-two-points-in-march/)

rics_price_balance.source: RICS UK Residential Market Survey, March 2026 (published 2026-04-09): aggregate net house-price balance -23% (down from -14% Feb, -10% Jan). Source PDF: https://www.rics.org/content/dam/ricsglobal/documents/market-surveys/uk-residential-market-survey/UK-Residential-Market-Survey-March-2026.pdf
